---
description: Review feature behavior from functional and user-value perspective.
mode: agent
---

Invoke `@review` to assess functional correctness for the active feature.

## Steps

1. Evaluate expected journeys from `spec.md` and `test-cases.md`.
2. Identify missing functional scenarios.
3. Flag ambiguous acceptance criteria.
4. Provide clear go/no-go verdict with rationale.

Output must include sections: Functional Coverage, Missing Journeys, Ambiguities, Verdict.
